title: LIVIVO Heavy Duty Pack Of 50 Stainless Steel Camping Tent Pegs with Curved Hook End Tops Galvanised Rust Proof Weather Proof 9” (23cm)
features: Pack of Heavy Duty 9” Galvanised Steel Tent Pegs
Made from a Heavy Duty Galvanised Steel with a Tensile Strength of 1136MPA
Features a Curved Hook End for a more secure Guy Line
A must have Backpack Essential for all Campers
DIMENSIONS – L23cm x W0.4cm / L9” x W0.2” (approx.)
description: Product Description Hillington 50x Iron Tent Peg Introducing our Hillington Set of 50 iron ground pegs - the perfect solution for all your outdoor securing needs. Whether you're camping, engaging in sports activities, or setting up a temporary shelter, these durable and reliable pegs will ensure your equipment stays firmly in place. Crafted from high-quality iron, these ground pegs offer an exceptional tensile strength of 1136 MPa, providing a secure hold even in challenging conditions. Using our ground pegs is a breeze. Simply press firmly into the ground, and they will anchor securely, ensuring your equipment remains stable and protected. Each peg measures 23 x 3 x 0.38cm and weighs approximately 22g.
